title: Wildflower
description: A new little spin to Minecraft
body:
![Wildflower banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e15b277ceb8251ff6854100e5d27922e590b675.png)

## A New Little Spin

The goal of Wildflower is to improve the aesthetics and add a bit more to Minecraft. We don't overhaul the game like other modpacks. Think of this as a faithful remix of the game!
## What’s in the Garden?

Better vibes: Subtle visual tweaks, more colors, and textures that feel like they belong in a sunlit forest or a blooming meadow.

Tiny extras: Small gameplay additions that enrich exploration without overwhelming you. Hidden treasures, new mobs, or just little things that make wandering fun again.

Smooth performance: We tried to keep it light, so it won’t slow down your game while making the world look prettier.


## Why Wildflower?

Because Minecraft should feel like an adventure worth lingering in. A place where even the tiniest corner has something to notice, a smell to imagine, or a scene to frame in your screenshots.

## Perfect For…

Players who like exploring but don’t want their game to get bogged down.

Builders who want inspiration from slightly enhanced visuals.

Anyone who just wants a chill, cozy vibe in Minecraft.

## Updating the Modpack & Tags

Before a new Wildflower update gets uploaded, it undergoes simulated gameplay testing to assess performance under normal conditions.
If the update meets our internal performance targets, it will be released with an **“A”** in the version name.
If it fails to meet those targets, it will be released with an **“F”** in the version name.

**Tags**

* **A** — Stable and user-ready; no major issues.
* **B** — Acceptable but below optimal performance targets (FPS and/or frametime slightly off).
* **F** — Performance issues; FPS and/or frametime significantly below target.

## OS Compatibility
| OS               | Compatible |
| ---------------- | :--------: |
| Windows          |      ✅     |
| MacOS (ARM) |      ✅     |

_Tested on Apple M1._
